title.en: Enforce Automatic Device Lockout on Portable End-User Devices

prose.en: Enforce automatic device lockout following a predetermined threshold of local failed authentication attempts on portable end-user devices, where supported. For laptops, do not allow more than 20 failed authentication attempts; for tablets and smartphones, no more than 10 failed authentication attempts. Example implementations include Microsoft® InTune Device Lock and Apple® Configuration Profile maxFailedAttempts.
Automatic device lockout is enforced following a predetermined threshold of local failed authentication attempts on portable end-user devices, where supported.
For laptops, no more than 20 failed authentication attempts are allowed.
For tablets and smartphones, no more than 10 failed authentication attempts are allowed.

example.en: Example implementations include Microsoft® InTune Device Lock and Apple® Configuration Profile maxFailedAttempts.
